scripts.build: npm run build -w @bim/test-toolkit && npm run build -w @bim/lib && npm run build -w @bim/domain && npm run build -w @bim/db && npm run build -w @bim/api
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:front && npm run copy:front -w @bim/api
scripts.test: npm run test -w @bim/test-toolkit && npm run test -w @bim/lib && npm run test -w @bim/domain && npm run test -w @bim/api && npm run test -w @bim/front
